'''kataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphos|xiphos]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphos|xiphos]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kataka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kætækæth|kætækæth]] || [[word:kætækæj|kætækæj]] || [[word:kætækæsh|kætækæsh]] || [[word:kætækæ|kætækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:katatakath|katatakath]] || [[word:katatakaj|katatakaj]] || [[word:katatakash|katatakash]] || [[word:katataka|katataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:katakath|katakath]] || [[word:katakaj|katakaj]] || [[word:katakash|katakash]] || [[word:kataka|kataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:katafkath|katafkath]] || [[word:katafkaj|katafkaj]] || [[word:katafkash|katafkash]] || [[word:katafkaf|katafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:katakatha|katakatha]] || [[word:katakaja|katakaja]] || [[word:katakasha|katakasha]] || [[word:katakaka|katakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:katakath|katakath]] || [[word:katakaj|katakaj]] || [[word:katakash|katakash]] || [[word:kataka|kataka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:katakathal|katakathal]] || [[word:katakajal|katakajal]] || [[word:katakashal|katakashal]] || [[word:katakakal|katakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:katakathatha|katakathatha]] || [[word:katakajaja|katakajaja]] || [[word:katakashasha|katakashasha]] || [[word:katakaka|katakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:katakathan|katakathan]] || [[word:katakajan|katakajan]] || [[word:katakashan|katakashan]] || [[word:katakakan|katakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:katakathaoro|katakathaoro]] || [[word:katakajaoro|katakajaoro]] || [[word:katakashaoro|katakashaoro]] || [[word:katakakaoro|katakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
